---
name: Mapping correction
about: A crosswalk mapping to a framework (ISO, EU AI Act, MITRE ATLAS, etc.) looks wrong or is missing
title: "[mapping] "
labels: mapping
---

**Which risk(s)?**
e.g. MR-071, or a sub-risk like MR-071.2

**Which framework and reference?**
e.g. ISO/IEC 42001 clause 6.1.2, EU AI Act Art. 9, MITRE ATLAS AML.T0051

**What is wrong or missing?**
Describe the mapping you would add, remove, or change.

**Source / rationale**
Cite the clause, article, control, or technique that supports it (a link or identifier).
